original_image_tags: Document shows punch holes at the top center. There are blue and red handwritten annotations. A blue stamp reading "NAT. INT. SEC." is in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A page of typed text containing an FBI Airtel form dated 4/28/64. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are present. The page includes several red ink stamps with visible dates such as 'MAY 8 1964', 'APR 30 1964', and text including 'NAT. INT. SEC.', along with various handwritten annotations and a vertical handwritten note reading 'Flying Saucers'.

judge.reason: Description A states specific visual elements (punch holes, blue and red handwritten annotations, a blue stamp) that are not mentioned or are contradicted by Description B's detailed inventory of stamps and text.
